nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before writing news items. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: RSS: CoinDesk
nodes.notes: Fetch CoinDesk RSS feed. Filter for Bittensor keywords post-fetch.

nodes.name: X API Search
nodes.notes: DISABLED until X API Basic activated (Phase 3). Enable when $200/mo X API is live.

nodes.name: Wait For All RSS
nodes.notes: Wait for all 4 parallel RSS feed requests to complete before proceeding. Uses append mode with 4 inputs so the node waits for data on every branch.

nodes.name: Sanitize RSS Input
nodes.notes: Sanitize all RSS input per CLAUDE.md Prompt Injection Safeguards. Strips instruction-like patterns, removes URLs from text, truncates to 500 chars, removes non-printable chars. Flags suspicious items for human review.

nodes.name: Filter + Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Filter sanitized RSS items for Bittensor keywords. Skip flagged items. Deduplicate by URL. Track processed URLs in n8n static data (n8n Cloud compatible).

nodes.name: New Items?
nodes.notes: Stop if no new relevant items found.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: Safe default: DRY_RUN must be strictly 'false' to proceed to news item collection. Any other value routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN: Discord Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run news item to Discord for review. Collection skipped.

nodes.name: Write News Items
nodes.notes: Store filtered news items in n8n static data as raw items (n8n Cloud compatible). No Claude API call. Content generation happens manually via Claude Code /generate-tweet skill.

nodes.name: Discord: News Items Ready
nodes.notes: Notify Vew that new ecosystem news items are collected and ready for manual content generation.
